endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Security/discoveredSecuritySolutions
endpoints.description: Gets a list of discovered Security Solutions for the subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Security/locations/{ascLocation}/discoveredSecuritySolutions
endpoints.description: Gets a list of discovered Security Solutions for the subscription and location.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ASCLOCATION}} with a real asclocation.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Security/locations/{ascLocation}/discoveredSecuritySolutions/{discoveredSecuritySolutionName}
endpoints.description: Gets a specific discovered Security Solution.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{DISCOVEREDSECURITYSOLUTIONNAME}} with a real discoveredsecuritysolutionname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{ASCLOCATION}} with a real asclocation.
